error_types.name: Specification Issues
error_types.description: Failures caused by violating, weakening, or distorting the original task, role, or termination specification.

subtypes.name: Task specification deviation
subtypes.description: The agent deviates from the original task requirements or changes the intended objective.

subtypes.name: Role specification deviation
subtypes.description: The agent behaves inconsistently with its assigned role, responsibility, or capability boundary.

subtypes.name: Add redundant steps
subtypes.description: The agent introduces unnecessary steps that do not contribute to solving the task and may increase confusion or cost.

subtypes.name: Remove conversation history
subtypes.description: The agent ignores, removes, or fails to preserve important prior conversation context.

subtypes.name: Remove termination conditions
subtypes.description: The agent removes or ignores conditions that define when the task should stop.

error_types.name: Inter-Agent Misalignment
error_types.description: Failures caused by poor coordination, inconsistent communication, or misalignment among agents.

subtypes.name: Repeat handled tasks
subtypes.description: The agent repeats work that has already been completed by another agent.

subtypes.name: Make request ambiguous
subtypes.description: The agent produces unclear or ambiguous requests that make it difficult for other agents to respond correctly.

subtypes.name: Deviate from main goal
subtypes.description: The agent shifts the conversation away from the main task objective.

subtypes.name: Hide important information
subtypes.description: The agent omits, withholds, or fails to share information that is necessary for other agents to perform the task.

subtypes.name: Ignore other agents
subtypes.description: The agent fails to consider or respond to relevant information, suggestions, or corrections from other agents.

subtypes.name: Inconsistent reasoning
subtypes.description: The agent provides reasoning that conflicts with previous reasoning, shared evidence, or the current task state.

error_types.name: Task Verification Failures
error_types.description: Failures caused by insufficient, incorrect, or premature verification of task progress or final answers.

subtypes.name: Premature termination
subtypes.description: The agent stops the task before the required goal has been fully achieved.

subtypes.name: Remove verification steps
subtypes.description: The agent skips or removes necessary checking, validation, or review steps.

subtypes.name: Incorrect verification
subtypes.description: The agent performs verification incorrectly, leading to false confidence in an incomplete or wrong result.
